data.content: Implementation review approved. All sanity gates pass (tsc clean, 2089 tests pass, build OK, lint 0 errors). Requirement 1: resolveStatsDir() unconditionally uses process.cwd()/.foolery-logs (working directory). AgentOutcomeRecord captures full details. classifyIterationSuccess correctly returns true only for nextQueueState or priorQueueState transitions with exit code 0. Requirement 2: non-zero exit triggers enforceQueueTerminalInvariant() rollback then buildNextTakePrompt(iterAgentId) with strict pool exclusion via selectFromPoolStrict. Returns null (terminates loop) when no alternative agent exists. Both initial and take-loop child close handlers delegate to handleTakeIterationClose. Test coverage validates all scenarios: retry with different agent, stop when no alternative, rollback before retry, success classification for next/prior/same/terminal/active states.
